name: Bring The Chickens Home
short_description: Fight against the clock as you gather as many chickens as you can in this Bullet Hell and bring them back home.
detailed_description:
Your chickens need help! They're lost from their adventurous day out and you need to bring them home fast. Kills hundreds of angry predators that are hungry to eat your chickens and be wary of incoming traffic. This mayhem filled action game has a bunch of exciting levels that test your survival skills. You can play solo, team up with a friend on local co-op or play split screen and compete against each other.

Bring the Chickens Home is a game that combines bullet hell and race against the clock together.

The goal is to survive for as long as you can. Score well and unlock more maps. Try to beat your best times or compete to be on the top of the global leaderboards online. Saving chickens will increase your wallet which is used to buy power ups to help you fight against the predators.

Key features

  • A selection of maps where you must try to survive as long as you can and save as many chickens as you can.
  • Speed, guns, explosion, cannons and many more with the use of power ups!
  • Level up and select up to 3 upgrades to choose a winning combination.
  • Compete against other times online and get a WORLD RECORD!
  • Endless fun exploring different strategies to try and score your best times.
  • Local co-op and Split screen versus mode with the option to play online using Steam's Remote Play.
